title: IELTS Speaking Cue Card: Describe a Book That Influenced You

cueCard.topic: Describe a book that has influenced you.
bullets: when and where you read it
cueCard.explainLine: and explain how this book has influenced you.

roundOff: Would you recommend this book to other people?
Do you often read this kind of book?

title: IELTS Speaking Cue Card: Describe a Person You Admire

cueCard.topic: Describe a person you admire.
bullets: how you know about this person
cueCard.explainLine: and explain why you admire this person.

roundOff: Have you ever met this person in real life?
Would you like to be more like this person?

title: IELTS Speaking Cue Card: Describe a Place You Would Like to Visit

cueCard.topic: Describe a place you would like to visit in the future.
bullets: how you first heard about it
cueCard.explainLine: and explain why you would like to visit this place.

roundOff: When do you think you will be able to go there?
Would you prefer to travel there alone or with others?

title: IELTS Speaking Cue Card: Describe a Possession That Is Important to You

cueCard.topic: Describe a possession that is important to you.
bullets: how long you have had it
cueCard.explainLine: and explain why it is so important to you.

roundOff: Would you ever give this item away?
Is it valuable in terms of money as well?

title: IELTS Speaking Cue Card: Describe a Memorable Celebration You Attended

cueCard.topic: Describe a memorable celebration you attended.
cueCard.explainLine: and explain why it was so memorable for you.

roundOff: Do you enjoy attending large celebrations?
Would you like to have a celebration like this again?

title: IELTS Speaking Cue Card: Describe a Time You Helped Someone

cueCard.topic: Describe a time when you helped someone.
cueCard.explainLine: and explain how you felt after helping this person.

roundOff: Did the person thank you afterwards?
Do you often help people you don't know?

title: IELTS Speaking Cue Card: Describe a Hobby You Enjoy

cueCard.topic: Describe a hobby or activity that you enjoy.
bullets: how you got started with it
cueCard.explainLine: and explain why you enjoy this hobby so much.

roundOff: Is this a common hobby in your country?
Would you like to turn this hobby into a job?

title: IELTS Speaking Cue Card: Describe a Dish You Really Like

cueCard.topic: Describe a dish or meal that you really like.
cueCard.explainLine: and explain why you like this dish so much.

roundOff: Can you cook this dish yourself?
Is this a popular dish where you live?

title: IELTS Speaking Cue Card: Describe a Skill You Would Like to Learn

cueCard.topic: Describe a skill you would like to learn.
bullets: how difficult you think it would be
cueCard.explainLine: and explain why you want to learn this particular skill.

roundOff: Do you think you will actually learn it one day?
Is this skill useful for your career?

title: IELTS Speaking Cue Card: Describe a Piece of Technology You Find Useful

cueCard.topic: Describe a piece of technology that you find useful.
cueCard.explainLine: and explain why you find this technology so useful.

roundOff: Could you live without this technology?
Do older people in your family use it too?

title: IELTS Speaking Cue Card: Describe a Memorable Journey You Took

cueCard.topic: Describe a memorable journey or trip you have taken.
cueCard.explainLine: and explain why this journey was so memorable.

roundOff: Would you take the same journey again?
Do you prefer long journeys or short ones?

title: IELTS Speaking Cue Card: Describe a Teacher Who Influenced You

cueCard.topic: Describe a teacher who has influenced you.
cueCard.explainLine: and explain how this teacher influenced you.

roundOff: Are you still in contact with this teacher?
Do you think you would make a good teacher?

title: IELTS Speaking Cue Card: Describe a Song That Means a Lot to You

cueCard.topic: Describe a song or piece of music that means a lot to you.
cueCard.explainLine: and explain why this song means so much to you.

roundOff: Do you listen to this song often?
Does this kind of music make you emotional?

title: IELTS Speaking Cue Card: Describe a Public Place You Like to Visit

cueCard.topic: Describe a public place, such as a park or square, that you like to visit.
cueCard.explainLine: and explain why you like this place.

roundOff: Is this place popular with other people?
Has this place changed much over the years?

title: IELTS Speaking Cue Card: Describe a Decision That Changed Your Life

cueCard.topic: Describe an important decision you made that changed your life.
cueCard.explainLine: and explain how this decision changed your life.

roundOff: Do you think it was the right decision?
Do you find it easy to make big decisions?

title: IELTS Speaking Cue Card: Describe a Gift You Gave to Someone

cueCard.topic: Describe a gift you gave to someone.
cueCard.explainLine: and explain how the person reacted when they received it.

roundOff: Do you enjoy choosing gifts for people?
Is it common to give gifts on special occasions in your country?

title: IELTS Speaking Cue Card: Describe a Time When You Were Very Busy

cueCard.topic: Describe a time when you were very busy.
cueCard.explainLine: and explain how you felt during this busy period.

roundOff: Do you prefer to be busy or to have free time?
How do you usually manage your time?

title: IELTS Speaking Cue Card: Describe a Photograph You Like

cueCard.topic: Describe a photograph that you like.
cueCard.explainLine: and explain why you like this photograph.

roundOff: Do you take a lot of photographs?
Do you prefer printed photos or digital ones?

title: IELTS Speaking Cue Card: Describe an Old Friend You Are Still in Contact With

cueCard.topic: Describe an old friend you are still in contact with.
bullets: how you keep in touch now
cueCard.explainLine: and explain why your friendship has lasted so long.

roundOff: How often do you see this friend these days?
Do you think it is easy to keep old friendships?

title: IELTS Speaking Cue Card: Describe a Natural Place You Have Visited

cueCard.topic: Describe a beautiful natural place you have visited, such as a mountain, river or forest.
cueCard.explainLine: and explain how you felt when you were there.

roundOff: Would you like to go back to this place?
Do you think it is important to protect places like this?
